title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IBM India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IBM India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at IBM India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IBM India International Enterprises:
IBM India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India International Enterprises!
